reports under cover of Form 20-F or Form 40-F:

 Form
20-F x Form 40-F o 

 EXPLANATORY NOTE 

 As an issuer
listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, we are required to submit with The Stock Exchange
of Hong Kong Limited a monthly return form in relation to the movements in our authorized share capital and issued shares (the
" Monthly Return ") pursuant to Rule 13.25B of the Hong Kong Listing Rules. We are furnishing our Monthly Return in respect
of March 2026 as Exhibit 99.1 of this Current Report on Form 6-K.

 2 

 EXHIBITS 

 Exhibit 99.1 &ndash; Monthly Return with The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong Limited &ndash; Monthly Return for Equity Issuer and Hong Kong Depositary Receipts listed under Chapter 19B of the Exchange Listing Rules on Movements in Securities 

 3 

 SIGNATURES 

 Pursuant to the requirements of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934,
the registrant has duly caused this report to be signed on its behalf by the undersigned, thereunto duly authorized.

 ALIBABA GROUP HOLDING LIMITED 

 Date: April 8, 2026
